# GLKViewDrawableStencilFormat.formatNone

**Case**

The underlying framebuffer object has no stencil buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
case formatNone
```

## Constants

- **GLKViewDrawableStencilFormat.format8**: An 8-bit stencil entry for each pixel.
